name: Escalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
For sauce:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter.
2. Blend in flour.
3. Cook over moderate heat and slowly stir in milk.
4. Season with salt and cayenne.
5. Continue cooking until the sauce is smooth and boiling.
6. Reduce heat and add cheese, stirring until blended.
7. Add green pepper/pimento mixture, stir, and remove from heat.
8. Grease a baking dish and fill with alternate layers of potatoes and sauce.
9. Bake in moderate oven, 350 degrees F (175 degrees C), until potatoes are done, about 1-1/2 to 2 hours. Potatoes may be turned with a spoon to ensure even cooking.
